grades.expectation: Response identifies this as requiring enhanced due diligence (EDD)
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions 'Enhanced Due Diligence' in section 4 with detailed EDD measures

grades.expectation: Response mentions source country risk assessment or FATF status
grades.reason: Section 1 specifically mentions checking FATF list of high-risk and increased-monitoring jurisdictions

grades.expectation: Response requires SWIFT/wire transfer confirmations or equivalent transfer evidence
grades.reason: Section 3 explicitly requires SWIFT/wire transfer confirmation with detailed requirements
Section 2 specifically addresses currency conversion evidence with detailed requirements

grades.expectation: Response mentions suspicious activity report (SAR) obligation if concerns arise
grades.reason: Section 5 explicitly mentions SAR reporting to NCA if money laundering suspicion arises
